name: xdm_localization_accessibility_overlay
description: Migrates retained XDM language packs into the active Avalonia shell and adds runtime switching, RTL, locale formatting, keyboard/screen-reader navigation, high contrast, and UI scaling.
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Treat retained language packs as bounded data only
Never evaluate translation markup, scripts or commands
Fallback to embedded English for unknown or missing translations
